name: gitlens_start_work
description: Gitlens Start Work. Creates a work based on an issue. This tool will create a branch and link it with the issue, keeping context visible throughout your work.

instructions.description: OPTIONAL. Use this ONLY if the user explicitly provided specific requirements about the implementation approach, or additional context to supplement the issue. Do NOT use this parameter unless you are 100% certain about the user's intentions.

issue_url.description: URL of the issue to start work on.
